description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: For an international air freight quote from Los Angeles to Tokyo for a 120 kg shipment, save the cheapest service that delivers in 5 days or less to your saved quotes.
tasks.name: For an international air freight quote from Los Angeles to Tokyo for a 120 kg shipment, save the cheapest service that delivers in 5 days or less to your saved quotes.
tasks.description: For an international air freight quote from Los Angeles to Tokyo for a 120 kg shipment, save the cheapest service that delivers in 5 days or less to your saved quotes.

tasks.instruction: Book a domestic ground shipment from Chicago to New York for about 10 boxes and 200 kg using the lowest-priced service that delivers in 3 days or less with a total cost of $800 or less.
tasks.name: Book a domestic ground shipment from Chicago to New York for about 10 boxes and 200 kg using the lowest-priced service that delivers in 3 days or less with a total cost of $800 or less.
tasks.description: Book a domestic ground shipment from Chicago to New York for about 10 boxes and 200 kg using the lowest-priced service that delivers in 3 days or less with a total cost of $800 or less.

tasks.instruction: For a ground shipment currently in transit that shows an address issue in its tracking details, change the delivery street address to a different street within the same city and move the scheduled delivery date 3 days later, then confirm the update.
tasks.name: For a ground shipment currently in transit that shows an address issue in its tracking details, change the delivery street address to a different street within the same city and move the scheduled delivery date 3 days later, then confirm the update.
tasks.description: For a ground shipment currently in transit that shows an address issue in its tracking details, change the delivery street address to a different street within the same city and move the scheduled delivery date 3 days later, then confirm the update.

tasks.instruction: For a full-container ocean freight quote with an estimated cargo volume of 28 m³, choose the lowest-priced container option whose capacity is at least that volume and whose total cost is under $3,000, and proceed with that container.
tasks.name: For a full-container ocean freight quote with an estimated cargo volume of 28 m³, choose the lowest-priced container option whose capacity is at least that volume and whose total cost is under $3,000, and proceed with that container.
tasks.description: For a full-container ocean freight quote with an estimated cargo volume of 28 m³, choose the lowest-priced container option whose capacity is at least that volume and whose total cost is under $3,000, and proceed with that container.

tasks.instruction: Create a domestic ground shipment from Miami to Dallas with three packages of different weights and dimensions, then select the lowest-priced ground service that offers morning delivery (such as delivery by noon) on the estimated delivery date.
tasks.name: Create a domestic ground shipment from Miami to Dallas with three packages of different weights and dimensions, then select the lowest-priced ground service that offers morning delivery (such as delivery by noon) on the estimated delivery date.
tasks.description: Create a domestic ground shipment from Miami to Dallas with three packages of different weights and dimensions, then select the lowest-priced ground service that offers morning delivery (such as delivery by noon) on the estimated delivery date.

tasks.instruction: In the help center, open a dangerous goods article about shipping lithium batteries by air to Canada, then use its contact link to submit a short dangerous goods question about sending lithium battery packs from the US to Canada and choose email as the preferred reply method.

target_names: Lithium Batteries – Air Shipping to Canada

expected_values.subject: Question about shipping lithium batteries to Canada
expected_values.message: Can I ship lithium battery packs from the US to Toronto, Canada via air service?

criteria.question_focus: shipping lithium battery packs from US to Canada via air

tasks.name: In the help center, open a dangerous goods article about shipping lithium batteries by air to Canada, then use its contact link to submit a short dangerous goods question about sending lithium battery packs from the US to Canada and choose email as the preferred reply method.
tasks.description: In the help center, open a dangerous goods article about shipping lithium batteries by air to Canada, then use its contact link to submit a short dangerous goods question about sending lithium battery packs from the US to Canada and choose email as the preferred reply method.

tasks.instruction: In your account address book, add one saved address for a main warehouse in Chicago and one for a client store in New York, then set the Chicago warehouse address as your default pickup location.
tasks.name: In your account address book, add one saved address for a main warehouse in Chicago and one for a client store in New York, then set the Chicago warehouse address as your default pickup location.

tasks.instruction: For a temperature-controlled freight quote from Paris to Rome, select the refrigerated service with the earliest estimated delivery date whose total price is under $2,500.
tasks.name: For a temperature-controlled freight quote from Paris to Rome, select the refrigerated service with the earliest estimated delivery date whose total price is under $2,500.
tasks.description: For a temperature-controlled freight quote from Paris to Rome, select the refrigerated service with the earliest estimated delivery date whose total price is under $2,500.

tasks.instruction: Set up a recurring pickup schedule so that a standard freight truck comes to the same Atlanta address every Tuesday at 3:00 PM for a period of 3 months.

target_names: Atlanta Weekly Tuesday 3 PM Standard Freight
